---
name: Feature Request ✨
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the feature
A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

### Use case / Motivation
What problem does this solve? How will you use it?

### Proposed solution
How do you imagine this feature working? Example code / API if possible.

### Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions you've tried or thought about.

### Additional context
Add any other context, screenshots, references here.
